results.title: Just: The end of Nebraska softball's season stings — its 'incredible story' has lasting impact
results.description: Nebraska softball's season ended with a sting, short of a national title, writes Amie Just, but its 'incredible story' of service and love will live on.

results.title: Georgia's Tre Phelps, coach Wes Johnson ejected after home run celebration in regional win over Liberty - Yahoo Sports

results.title: Maple Leafs’ Max Domi struggled to walk after offseason surgery gone ‘terribly wrong’
results.description: The Maple Leafs announced on May 25 that Max Domi underwent surgery to address an “issue he played through during the 2025-26 season."
